tweaks.title: Advertising ID
tweaks.description: Offer to turn off app advertising ID for the current user.

tweaks.title: Suggested content
tweaks.description: Offer to reduce suggested content in Windows settings where supported.

tweaks.title: App launch tracking
tweaks.description: Offer to disable app launch tracking for Start recommendations.

tweaks.title: Feedback frequency
tweaks.description: Offer a user-visible feedback frequency setting where supported.
